message:
The other day, as I was rummaging through our go-bags, I decided to share a little checklist in the family group chat. You know, the usual stuff—water, snacks, important documents—just to keep everyone on the same page. It was actually kind of fun! My sister chimed in with her favorite granola bar suggestion, and my brother sent a meme about the importance of snacks during an emergency. 😄 

By the end of the convo, we not only had our essentials sorted, but we also shared some laughs. It reminded me that preparedness doesn’t have to be all serious business; it can be a team effort that brings us closer together. 

Have you ever had a similar chat with your family? What’s the funniest thing that came up?
